description_long: This apartment building complex features a row of modern, boxy residential units with flat roofs and large, rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern. The facade is dominated by cool-toned materials, likely concrete and glass, giving it a contemporary urban appearance. Each unit appears to have its own balcony, with railings visible along the front. Adjacent to the main row of apartments is a larger, separate structure, possibly a communal facility or parking garage, with a dark, sloped roof. A paved driveway or access road runs alongside the buildings, connecting the structures and providing vehicular access. The overall layout is linear, with the buildings and road enclosed by a subtle boundary or fencing.
description: A modern, linear apartment building complex with flat roofs, large windows, and balconies, accompanied by a separate utility or garage structure and a paved access road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the row of apartment units with balconies and the adjacent utility building connected by a driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the apartment row, the separate utility structure, and the linear arrangement of the complex.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the apartment units, the full extent of the driveway, and the utility building's roof.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the balconies, the main entrance area, and the relationship between the apartment row and the utility building.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, horizontal alignment across each unit, with consistent spacing and a symmetrical pattern along the facade.
